name: promovid
description: AdBot MVP - SaaS platform for creating short promotional videos.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @promovid/shared run build && npm --workspace @promovid/api run build && npm --workspace @promovid/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @promovid/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @promovid/shared run build && npm --workspace @promovid/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @promovid/web run typecheck
